title: HypurrCo AMA Series: GlueX Terminal
summary_title: GlueX Terminal: unified DeFi portfolio view with risk, yield, and execution
summary_description: Felix from GlueX reveals their terminal product—aggregating all DeFi positions, liquidation risk, and APY in one dashboard launching December.

key_moments.label: HyperCollective introduces itself as ecosystem validator and content creator
Felix shares GlueX's origin: three years building intent solvers for Curve
Pivot moment: recognizing fragmentation across L2s motivated building aggregation
Two-million gas limit and vault tokens require HyperLiquid-specific optimization
GlueX Terminal revealed: unified semantic layer for all DeFi protocols
Terminal combines portfolio overview, risk analytics, and direct execution
Recent $19B liquidation and protocol exploits prove portfolio risk visibility crucial
Beta access rolling out this week, public December launch targeted
